PackList.title: Full Face
positive_prompts:
Retake the photo to a more photogenic version while keeping the same person, identity, age, gender, skin tone, facial structure, and overall realism.

Improve only the unflattering capture issues: refine facial expression into a natural pleasant smile, open the eyes naturally if half-closed, reduce awkward tension in the lips/cheeks, and correct small asymmetry caused by the moment.

Fix hair covering the face: move strands away from eyes and mouth, reveal eyebrows and both eyes clearly, keep the original hairstyle and hair color, keep hair texture realistic.

Enhance photo quality subtly: correct exposure and white balance, reduce motion blur, increase sharpness on face, soften harsh shadows, keep natural skin texture (no over-smoothing), keep pores and fine details.

Keep the same background, framing, outfit, and lighting style; do not change camera angle or create a different scene. Output should look like a realistic retake shot from the same moment, just better.
PackList.negative_prompt: identity change, hairstyle change, hair color change, makeup glam, body shape modification, outfit change, background change, filters, plastic skin, uncanny face, over-whitening teeth, exaggerated smile, AI beauty look, face reshaping, heavy beautification

Retake the photo to fix blink/half-closed eyes. Keep identity unchanged.

Open the eyes naturally with the same eye shape and gaze direction; keep eyelids and lashes realistic.

PackList.negative_prompt: identity change, hairstyle change, hair color change, makeup glam, body shape modification, outfit change, background change, filters, plastic skin, uncanny face, over-whitening teeth, exaggerated smile, AI beauty look, big anime eyes, eye enlargement, gaze change

PackList.title: Dark Circles
positive_prompts:
Retake the photo while keeping the exact same person, identity, age, skin tone, facial structure, and the same facial expression (no changes to smile, mouth shape, or eye expression).

Naturally reduce under-eye dark circles and tired shadows: even out the under-eye tone, soften discoloration, and slightly reduce puffiness while preserving natural skin texture (pores, fine lines, realistic details).

Keep the original eye shape, eyelids, lashes, eyebrows, and gaze unchanged.

Maintain the same background, outfit, framing, and lighting style; apply only subtle exposure and white-balance correction.
PackList.negative_prompt: heavy beautification, face reshaping, eye enlargement, makeup changes, plastic skin, airbrushed skin, whitening whole face, identity change, expression change
